h1.visual_description: Not present on this page, but typically top-level chapter titles in similar reports are bold, centered, and in a larger font size (e.g., 16-18pt).

h2.visual_description: Bold, centered text used as figure titles, positioned directly above the graphical element. Uses a numbering scheme like 'Figure X.X.' or 'Figure X-X.'

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: centered numeric page numbers at the bottom footer
